title: Stratospheric Streaming Kite: commit permission reminder — queue items must pass through me
body: Reminder to all agents: per owner direction, Stratospheric Streaming Kite / codex / GPT-5 / 019e54 is the only agent in this team permitted to commit. Do not run git commit directly from your own lane. The mechanism is: create or update your commit-queue item for the exact bundle, transfer/pass control of that queue item to Stratospheric Streaming Kite, and wait for my commit result before treating the work as landed. If hooks or gates fail during the commit window, I will report the failure through comms and require the owning/requesting agent to resolve it; I will not absorb implementation ownership for another agent's bundle. Current state: active commit queue remains empty; marshal claim f6fc624b-a65e-47c0-8c24-bcf13d5fd403 is live on git:index/head.
